# Requirement: FR-005

- Title: Modernize site layout with technology-forward visual language
- Status: Active

## Requirement Statement

The system shall present a modern, technology-forward visual layout that improves clarity, hierarchy, and credibility while preserving fast static delivery and accessibility.

## Rationale

The current layout communicates core content but lacks a distinct modern/technical visual identity. A stronger visual system should increase perceived professionalism and better match consultant positioning in AI, automation, and software delivery.

## Acceptance Conditions

- Home and key marketing pages use an updated visual system (typography, spacing, color, section hierarchy) that is consistent across pages.
- Navigation and primary calls-to-action remain clearly discoverable across desktop and mobile breakpoints.
- Layout updates preserve readability and pass baseline accessibility checks (contrast, focus visibility, semantic structure).
- Existing content sections (services, projects, reviews, contact) remain reachable without broken routes.

## Success Metrics

- Design refresh is applied consistently to all top-level pages.
- No increase in build/type/lint/format failures after redesign.

## Non-Goals

- Replatforming framework or replacing the static-site architecture.
- Adding dynamic runtime personalization in this slice.

## Constraints

- Keep static-first architecture and current delivery pipeline.
- Preserve existing content contracts unless explicitly approved via ICR for breaking changes.
